## Fixes

- **Push-to-talk no longer stacks transcripts across presses.** Each press now guarantees exactly one live dictation session: any previous session still winding down is closed (including its network connection) before the new one starts, so leftover text from an earlier dictation can no longer bleed into the current one — and stale connections can no longer pile up in the background.
- **Rapid presses are handled cleanly.** A very quick tap no longer leaves an orphaned session running behind the scenes, and pressing again while the previous dictation was still finishing now delivers that text immediately and starts fresh — previously that press was silently ignored.
